items.title_en: Microsoft and Nvidia finally became cheap enough for this value investor – and he plans to buy any dips
items.title_zh: 对于这位价值投资者来说，微软和英伟达终于变得足够便宜了——他计划逢低买入
items.desc_en: Chris Grisanti, chief market strategist at MAI Capital Management, said he bought into the megacaps in the first quarter of the year.
items.desc_zh: MAI Capital Management 首席市场策略师 Chris Grisanti 表示，他在今年第一季度买入了大型股。

items.title_en: New images show suspect taking selfies before Washington press dinner shooting
items.title_zh: 新图像显示嫌疑人在华盛顿新闻晚宴枪击事件前自拍
items.desc_en: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.
items.desc_zh: 检察官认为，科尔·托马斯·艾伦应继续被拘留，直至因企图刺杀唐纳德·特朗普总统的指控而受审。

items.title_en: Amazon set to report first-quarter earnings after the bell
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将于盘后公布第一季度收益
items.desc_en: Amazon's earnings report will show investors what growth looks like in the cloud business, where revenue is expected to increase 26%
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊的财报将向投资者展示云业务的增长情况，预计收入将增长 26%

items.title_en: Meta looks to report fastest revenue growth since 2021
items.title_zh: Meta 有望报告 2021 年以来最快的收入增长
items.desc_en: In Meta's earnings report after the bell, investors will be monitoring the company's hefty AI spending and whether the war in Iran is having an impact.
items.desc_zh: 在 Meta 盘后的收益报告中，投资者将关注该公司巨额的人工智能支出以及伊朗战争是否产生影响。

items.title_en: Alphabet first-quarter results likely to show continued growth, boosted by cloud
items.title_zh: Alphabet 第一季度业绩可能会在云计算的推动下持续增长
items.desc_en: Wall Street expects Alphabet to report its strongest quarter for revenue growth since 2022.
items.desc_zh: 华尔街预计 Alphabet 将报告 2022 年以来最强劲的收入增长季度。

items.title_en: Ford Motor is set to report earnings after the bell. Here's what Wall Street expects
items.title_zh: 福特汽车将于盘后公布财报。这是华尔街的期望
items.desc_en: Aside from earnings and any changes to the automaker's 2026 guidance, investors will be monitoring effects from the Iran war, tariffs and the pullback in EVs.
items.desc_zh: 除了盈利和汽车制造商 2026 年指导方针的任何变化外，投资者还将关注伊朗战争、关税和电动汽车产量减少的影响。

items.title_en: Uber makes big bets on travel, hotels and AI voice bookings at annual product showcase
items.title_zh: Uber在年度产品展示会上大力投资旅游、酒店和人工智能语音预订
items.desc_en: Uber is launching new segments as it attempts to position itself as an all-in-one consumer platform.
items.desc_zh: 优步正在推出新的细分市场，试图将自己定位为一体化消费者平台。

items.title_en: Cole Allen took selfie before Trump assassination attempt at WHCA dinner, prosecutors say
items.title_zh: 检察官称科尔·艾伦在特朗普刺杀企图在 WHCA 晚宴上自拍
items.desc_en: Federal prosecutors' detention memo shows guns and knives Allen was allegedly carrying as he tried to enter the White House Correspondents' Association dinner.
items.desc_zh: 联邦检察官的拘留备忘录显示，艾伦在试图进入白宫记者协会晚宴时据称携带枪支和刀具。

items.title_en: France investigates reappearance of website linked to Pelicot crimes
items.title_zh: 法国调查与 Pelicot 犯罪相关的网站再次出现
items.desc_en: Authorities say the Coco platform has been linked to sexual abuse of children, drug offences, rape and murder.
items.desc_zh: 当局表示，Coco 平台与儿童性虐待、毒品犯罪、强奸和谋杀有关。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court limits use of race in drawing electoral maps
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院限制在绘制选举地图时使用种族因素
items.desc_en: The decision will make it more difficult to successfully challenge legislative maps for diluting the voting power of racial minorities.
items.desc_zh: 这一决定将使成功挑战稀释少数族裔投票权的立法地图变得更加困难。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Oil price jumps to $117 after reports of 'extended' Iran blockade
items.title_zh: 有报道称“延长”伊朗封锁后油价跃升至 117 美元
items.desc_en: The price of crude oil has swung sharply as uncertainty over the war in the Middle East continues.
items.desc_zh: 由于中东战争的不确定性持续存在，原油价格大幅波动。

items.title_en: Former Attorney General Bondi to testify about Epstein on May 29 before House panel
items.title_zh: 前司法部长邦迪将于 5 月 29 日在众议院小组面前就爱泼斯坦问题作证
items.desc_en: The House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform subpoenaed former Attorney General Pam Bondi in March.
items.desc_zh: 众议院监督和政府改革委员会于三月份传唤了前司法部长帕姆·邦迪。

items.title_zh: 罗伯特·穆加贝之子因枪支犯罪将被南非驱逐出境

items.desc_zh: 这名 28 岁的男子于二月份在约翰内斯堡的家中被一名男子枪杀后被捕。

items.title_en: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.title_zh: 加拿大大规模枪击事件受害者家属对 OpenAI 提起七起诉讼
items.desc_en: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.desc_zh: 这些诉讼在加利福尼亚州提起，指控 OpenAI 和 Sam Altman 疏忽大意，未能标记嫌疑人的 ChatGPT 活动，从而煽动大规模枪击事件。

items.title_en: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
items.title_zh: 全球森林损失放缓，但厄尔尼诺火灾可能威胁进展
items.desc_en: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.
items.desc_zh: 根据新的分析，去年热带雨林的消失有所缓解，但科学家警告说，它们仍在迅速消失。

items.title_en: Trump threatens Iran with AI picture of himself with a gun: 'No more Mr. Nice guy!'
items.title_zh: 特朗普用人工智能拍摄的自己持枪的照片威胁伊朗：“不再是好人先生了！”
items.desc_en: Oil prices continued to rise on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump appeared to threaten Iran in a TruthSocial post.
items.desc_zh: 在美国总统唐纳德·特朗普似乎在 TruthSocial 帖子中威胁伊朗后，周三油价继续上涨。

items.title_en: OpenAI’s subtle drift from Microsoft has become an aggressive move toward Amazon
items.title_zh: OpenAI 对微软的微妙转变已成为对亚马逊的激进举动
items.desc_en: While OpenAI and Microsoft remain partners, the AI company has been rapidly pushing into Amazon's world.
items.desc_zh: 虽然 OpenAI 和微软仍然是合作伙伴，但这家人工智能公司一直在迅速进军亚马逊的世界。

items.title_en: Russia scales back Moscow Victory Day parade, blaming threat from Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯缩减莫斯科胜利日阅兵规模，指责乌克兰威胁

items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯表示，苏联在第二次世界大战中胜利的年度纪念活动不会有军用车辆或学员。

items.title_zh: 官员称以色列“双击”袭击导致黎巴嫩三名救援人员死亡

items.desc_zh: 官员称，他们是周二连续袭击事件中丧生的五人之一。

items.desc_zh: 上周末的袭击发生时，非洲军团从马里北部的一个重要基地撤出。

items.desc_zh: 在最近几周的全国抗议活动之后，爱尔兰政府宣布为多个行业提供进一步的燃料支持。

items.desc_zh: 英国也发布了类似的建议，告诉留下来的公民，他们需要自行承担风险。

items.title_en: First Vegas-style casino opens in New York City
items.title_zh: 第一家维加斯风格的赌场在纽约市开业
items.desc_en: New York City's first full-scale casino with live table games opened to gamblers more than a decade after New York voters approved an expansion of gambling.
items.desc_zh: 在纽约选民批准扩大赌博业十多年后，纽约市第一家配备现场赌桌游戏的大型赌场向赌徒开放。

items.title_en: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.
items.desc_zh: 工作人员训练人工智能通过在照片和视频中标记物品来识别日常物品。

items.title_en: Former FBI director James Comey indicted for second time
items.title_zh: 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米第二次被起诉
items.desc_en: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey that critics have said encouraged violence against the US president.
items.desc_zh: 该起诉书源于科米发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片，批评者称这张照片鼓励了针对美国总统的暴力行为。

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。

items.title_en: China blocks Meta's $2bn acquisition of AI start-up Manus
items.title_zh: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能初创公司 Manus
items.desc_en: It comes after months of scrutiny by Chinese regulators over deal struck with Facebook owner.
items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.desc_zh: 结婚近 60 年后，帕姆想在丈夫比尔的葬礼上用全息图来纪念他。

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。
